CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-14-2007 Continued To Apr-06-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Disqulify Pltf'S Counsel Edward Kerley And His Law Firm
Off Calendar Jan-30-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
CASEY MCNAMARA FROM FOLGER LEVIN & KAHN LLP, 986-2800, APPEARED FOR DEFENDANT AND MOVING PARTY
J. EDWARD KERLEY FROM DOHERTY GEORGESON KERLEY LLP, 510-433-2682, APPEARED FOR PLAINTIFF AND RESPONDING PARTY

ARGUMENT WAS HEARD AND THE COURT ADOPTED IT'S TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT NOT ORDINARY BUSINESS SERVICES, INC.'S Motion To Disqualify PLAINTIFF'S Counsel Edward Kerley And His Law Firm IS GRANTED, PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL'S VIOLATION OF RULE 2-100 RESULTED IN HIM GIVING CONFIDENTIAL INFO THAT IS LIKELY TO HAVE A CONTINUING EFFECT ON LITIGATION TO THE PREJUDICE OF DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL AND HIS LAW FIRM ARE DISQUALIFIED. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. (301/PJB/PM) Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR # 8189

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-04-2007 Continued To Feb-23-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212
